one_line_verdict: A witty, star-powered romantic comedy-drama for fans of Borgli's chaos energy — best enjoyed on streaming unless you love big-screen chemistry between Zendaya and Pattinson.
good_for: fans of Zendaya or Robert Pattinson
english_note: Casual conversational dialogue, no heavy accents or jargon — very accessible for non-native English speakers.
credits_detail: No credits scene — Borgli's films typically don't feature post-credits sequences (speculative).
one_line_summary: Zendaya and Pattinson's chemistry ignites when wedding week chaos hilariously unravels.
